Try adjusting the order you use your cards

you can learn the fundamentals

In Training “Basics: Focus,”
you can learn the fundamentals

In Training “Basics: Good Impression,”
you can learn the fundamentals

your score bonus will increase too

Use your cards on ходов with high
score bonuses while in Good Condition

Use your cards on ходов with high
score bonuses while your Focus is high

Try to focus on stacking
up Good Impression

Make use of cards that earn score
based on your Energy value

You have plenty of ability, but don’t let your
guard down, give it your all in the final exam!

You’ve built up enough ability
to clear the final exam!

Your Вокал is a bit of a concern,
but you still have a chance to win

Your Танец is a bit of a concern,
but you still have a chance to win

Your Визуал is a bit of a concern,
but you still have a chance to win

your guard down, take on the exam!

I’m sure you can pass the exam!

У вас есть P-очки. Почему бы не посоветоваться
с преподавателем и подготовиться как следует?

Замечательно! Похоже, способностей
уже более чем достаточно
